The text here printed of WottonтАЩs poem is that of Reliquiae Wottonianae, 1st ed., 1651, edited by Izaak Walton; except that I read (with the earlier texts) l. 5 тАЬMoone,тАЭ l. 8 тАЬPassions,тАЭ l. 16 тАЬPrincess,тАЭ instead of тАЬSun,тАЭ тАЬVoyces,тАЭ тАЬMistrisтАЭ of the 1651 edition.

ShakespeareтАЩs Sonnet is from the Quarto of 1609.

The passage from Nj├бls Saga in the Induction is quoted from the late Sir George DasentтАЩs classic translation.
